creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
Julian Mehnle schrieb:,

>  $ ldd /usr/local/libexec/apache22/mod_ssl.so
>  /usr/local/libexec/apache22/mod_ssl.so:
>          libssl.so.4 => /usr/lib/libssl.so.4 (0x800973000)
>          libcrypto.so.4 => /lib/libcrypto.so.4 (0x800aab000)
>          libcrypt.so.3 => /lib/libcrypt.so.3 (0x800cf4000)
>  
>  How can I find out more?

Thanks.
You have build with opessl from base, not from ports.

You should see something like:
$ ldd /usr/local/libexec/apache/libssl.so
        libssl.so.5 => /usr/local/lib/libssl.so.5 (0x800c00000)
        libcrypto.so.5 => /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.5 (0x800d4d000)
        libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x800649000)
        libz.so.4 => /lib/libz.so.4 (0x800fc5000)
        libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x8010d9000)


kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
